Notice Of Motion For Change Of Venue To Orange County
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CALPORTLAND COMPANY Motion for Change of Venue from San Francisco Superior Court to Orange County Superior Court, for the State of California. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted pursuant to stipulation between Plaintiff and Defendant Calportland Company. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
